allow: Bash("venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import torch; ckpt=torch.load\(''checkpoints/checkpoint_108_linear.pth'', map_location=''cpu'', weights_only=False\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(ckpt.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''Best Dice:'', ckpt.get\(''best_dice''\)\); state=ckpt[''state_dict'']; print\(''Total params:'', len\(state\)\); print\(''Sample:'', list\(state.keys\(\)\)[:3]\)")
